name: Chloe Martin
behaviour: Excellent networker with a genuine interest in how people tick — it's not calculation, it's care.
communication_style: inclusive communicator, brings everyone into the conversation
relationship_goals: a relationship that doubles as a team navigating life together
background: Runs a boutique PR firm in Montréal. Knows the journalists, knows the chefs, knows the artists. The city comes to her.
